programmes.statusNote: The live official 2026-27 Programme page confirms Programme code A1M128 and a 24-credit-point award comprising four required 3-credit-point Core Courses plus one of two completion pathways. Pathway one, open to full-time and part-time students, requires four of five 3-credit-point Elective Courses. Pathway two, available only to selected full-time students, requires the 6-credit-point Capstone Project plus two of the five Elective Courses. Official EdUHK curriculum-module pages confirm every current course-code mapping and title. The selected-student eligibility condition and the two alternative combinations require manual audit review.

courseGroups.name: Core Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete all four Core Courses (12 credit points).

courses.name: Triple Helix Model: University-Industry-Government Collaboration and Innovation
Research Methods: Comparative and Mixed Methods
Education and Society: International and Comparative Perspectives
Transforming Education in a Changing World: Insights from Europe and Asia

courseGroups.name: Elective and Capstone Pathways
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete either four of the five 3-credit-point Elective Courses, or, if selected as an eligible full-time student, PFS6085 Capstone Project (6 credit points) plus two of the five Elective Courses.

courses.name: Technology and Innovation Policies: Development and Trend
Entrepreneurialism and Interprofessional Learning in Higher Education
China's Regional Economy and Hong Kong's Economic Development: Challenges and Opportunities
Strategic Management and Planning for Edupreneurs
Capstone Project in Comparative Education and Collaborative Innovation
